default.description: Pagination page info text color (e.g., 'Page 1 of 10') - standard body text

subtle.description: Pagination page info subtle text color (e.g., '1 of 356') - lighter body text for minimal design

default.description: Pagination input field default background - white for clear contrast

hover.description: Pagination input field hover background - remains white

focused.description: Pagination input field focused background - white

disabled.description: Pagination input field disabled background - light gray

default.description: Pagination input field default border - standard neutral border

hover.description: Pagination input field hover border - darker gray for feedback

focused.description: Pagination input field focused border - primary blue for focus indication

disabled.description: Pagination input field disabled border - light gray

default.description: Pagination input field default text - dark for readability

placeholder.description: Pagination input field placeholder text (e.g., '...') - medium gray

disabled.description: Pagination input field disabled text - muted gray

hover.description: Pagination dropdown hover background - light gray

disabled.description: Pagination dropdown disabled background - light gray

default.description: Pagination dropdown default border - standard neutral border

hover.description: Pagination dropdown hover border - darker gray

focused.description: Pagination dropdown focused border - primary blue

disabled.description: Pagination dropdown disabled border - light gray

default.description: Pagination dropdown default text - dark for readability

disabled.description: Pagination dropdown disabled text - muted gray

default.description: Pagination dropdown default icon (chevron) - medium gray

hover.description: Pagination dropdown hover icon - medium gray

focused.description: Pagination dropdown focused icon - medium gray

disabled.description: Pagination dropdown disabled icon - light gray

border.description: Border color for connected button groups (collapsed view) - standard neutral border

md.description: 13px medium weight font for medium size page info text (e.g., 'Page 1 of 10')

sm.description: 11px medium weight font for small size page info text

md.description: 13px regular weight font for medium size subtle page info (e.g., '1 of 356')

sm.description: 12px regular weight font for small size subtle page info

md.description: 14px regular weight font for medium size input fields

sm.description: 14px regular weight font for small size input fields

md.description: 14px regular weight font for medium size dropdown

sm.description: 14px regular weight font for small size dropdown

input.description: 4px border radius for pagination input fields and dropdowns

left.description: 4px border radius for left side of collapsed button group (left arrow)

right.description: 4px border radius for right side of collapsed button group (right arrow)

md.description: 4px gap between pagination buttons in expanded view (medium size)

sm.description: 4px gap between pagination buttons in expanded view (small size)

md.description: 8px gap between button group and page info text in collapsed view (medium size)

sm.description: 8px gap between button group and page info text in collapsed view (small size)

md.description: 4px gap between elements in simple pagination (medium size)

sm.description: 4px gap between elements in simple pagination (small size)

md.description: 32px width for medium size pagination input field

sm.description: 24px width for small size pagination input field

md.description: 32px height for medium size pagination input field

sm.description: 24px height for small size pagination input field

md.description: 8px horizontal padding for medium size pagination input field

sm.description: 6px horizontal padding for small size pagination input field

md.description: No vertical padding for medium size pagination input field - height is controlled by container

sm.description: No vertical padding for small size pagination input field - height is controlled by container

md.description: 56px width for medium size pagination dropdown (accommodates number + chevron)

sm.description: 48px width for small size pagination dropdown

md.description: 32px height for medium size pagination dropdown

sm.description: 24px height for small size pagination dropdown

md.description: 8px horizontal padding for medium size pagination dropdown

sm.description: 8px horizontal padding for small size pagination dropdown

md.description: 6px vertical padding for medium size pagination dropdown

sm.description: 6px vertical padding for small size pagination dropdown

md.description: 96px total width for medium size collapsed button group (left arrow + input + right arrow)

sm.description: 72px total width for small size collapsed button group

md.description: 32px height for medium size collapsed button group

sm.description: 24px height for small size collapsed button group

md.description: 16px chevron icon size for medium pagination dropdown

sm.description: 12px chevron icon size for small pagination dropdown

expanded.description: Full pagination with individual page number buttons, Previous/Next buttons, and optional ellipsis input
expanded.use-case: Use when you want users to see and directly access multiple page numbers at once

collapsed-field.description: Compact pagination with left/right arrows and an input field for direct page entry, displays 'Page X of Y' text
collapsed-field.use-case: Use when space is limited but you still want to allow direct page number entry

collapsed-dropdown.description: Compact pagination with left/right arrows and a dropdown selector for page selection, displays 'Page X of Y' text
collapsed-dropdown.use-case: Use when you want guided page selection with a dropdown menu instead of free-form input

simple.description: Minimal pagination with just page count text (e.g., '1 of 356') and simple arrow navigation
simple.use-case: Use for extremely space-constrained layouts or when minimal visual weight is desired

ring.description: Focus ring for pagination input fields - primary blue glow
